# Golden fixture scaffold

This directory records the Phase 0 MVP fixture contract without committing large or third-party audio files.

- The three required fixture IDs are declared in `golden_manifest.json`.
- Each entry is a self-created synthetic placeholder and points to a future local audio path under `audio/`.
- Rubric records live in `rubric_records/` so missing manual evaluation evidence is testable before real audio lands.
- Example arrangement and quality artifacts under `arrangements/` and `quality_reports/` pin the shared contract for other workers.
